title: helixyra flava
intro: Helixyra flava, also known as golden helixyra, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of helixyra flava include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for medicinal use.
